text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Tracen Academy is hosting an off-campus
party for the press and all the sponsor companies
that support the school.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Within the hustle and bustle, I find Sirius Symboli.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Huh. Didn't think I'd see you here.
choice_data_list: I was helping with things. You?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Some guests wanted to see me personally, so I
thought, why not? I could humor them with a
conversation or two.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I admire how easily she takes things in stride, and
we talk for a bit. Not long after, the party begins.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
And to start things off, the Emperor herself,
Symboli Rudolf, will perform a ballroom dance for
us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The room erupts with applause as Symboli Rudolf
walks in with her dance partner. Both dancers
gracefully move in time to the music.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their footsteps echo through the hall. While the
guests are smitten by the elegant performance,
Sirius Symboli looks rather grim.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
This is the most boring dance I've seen in my life.
Hmph, there she is, playing the model student as
usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be talking about Symboli Rudolf... I'm
not sure I agree, though. From what I can see, she
looks like quite the skillful dancer.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hey, do you know what the Emperor's motto is?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: It's "Take it easy."

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Everything comes easy to her. She should be free to make any choice she wants.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
But she doesn't understand the value of that
privilege.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
There's a few reasons why an Umamusume might
distance herself from racing.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Injuries, poor performance, mental strain, family
matters, aptitudes, and so on...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Your average Umamusume is bound to be
burdened with at least one of these problems.
They can never truly be free.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
When you take that into consideration, it
becomes clear just how special she is.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
She had everything she could need. She had the
freedom everyone seeks in the palm of her hand.
And yet...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: She chose to let go of that freedom.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: She trapped herself with the idea that she should act a certain way and chose to walk the straight, narrow, and boring. Tch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli turns her severe gaze toward the
center of the room. What she sees is privy only to
herself.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I'm done with this joke of a party. I'm off.
choice_data_list: But aren't you scheduled to dance too?
But aren't you scheduled to dance too?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Like I care. I'm sure having the Emperor around is
more than enough for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hang on now... If things are boring, then I just
have to take matters into my own hands.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I'll turn this stuffy party upside down, dance floor
and all! Heh... Haha! Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: That settles it. Give me your hand.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Well, you're not one of the Emperor's countless
adoring puppets.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So you'll be my partner for tonight. Don't go
embarrassing me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, she yanks my hand and pulls me onto
the dance floor. Frazzled from the turn of events,
I hastily try to follow her lead.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Good, now spin! That's it, keep up with my lead!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Did you see their faces? None of the
guests could manage to close their mouths. Our
dance was a masterpiece!
choice_data_list: I almost had a heart attack...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
But it made for a valuable experience, didn't it?
Well, try not to get hooked on that feeling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says she wants to get some fresh air, so we
hike to somewhere higher up. We look down at
the town and spot the party hall.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Look at that tiny box of a venue. No way I could
stand being cooped up in that place.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Screw the "tried and true" path. I'm going to
destroy that old, boring path and take the one
lined with thorns. And someday...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: I'll find my way there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points to one particular star, dazzlingly
bright in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Sirius is the brightest star out there. It shines high
above the world. One day, everyone'll look up to
me, just like how they look up to that star.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The star glints in the night sky like a gleaming
wolf's fang—sharp, savage, and hungering for
more.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Now that wasn't too hard, was it?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
A little more polish and you would've been
perfect. You'd better work harder if you want my
stamp of approval.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a smile on her face, Sirius Symboli leaves the
room. I can't describe how relieved I am that I got
through that in one piece...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. May I have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That was you dancing with Sirius, correct? While
it wasn't on the program, your performance did
wonders to liven up the party.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I give you both my thanks.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. And it's not just what she did today that
I'm grateful for.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Her ideas are free. She's unhindered by
conformity, which leaves anyone who sees her
mesmerized.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Today's guests are only a portion of her admirers.
But I know she's equally beloved by the students.
Many of them flock to her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps there is more than one star of hope that
lights the way for those lost and struggling...
